message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate 5 more stub modules to ZigBuilder (batch 6)

Migrated:
- zipimport_mod.zig - Zip import support
- _ast_mod.zig - AST constants
- ensurepip_mod.zig - Bootstrap pip
- _sitebuiltins_mod.zig - Site builtins
- cgitb_mod.zig - CGI traceback manager

Progress: 52/308 modules migrated (17%)
